# Phonopy single-point INCAR template
# For use with phonopy finite displacement method
# Run this INCAR for EACH displaced POSCAR generated by phonopy
# DO NOT relax ions — this is a single-point force calculation
SYSTEM = phonopy_single_point
PREC   = Accurate
ENCUT  = 520
EDIFF  = 1E-8         # CRITICAL: very tight convergence for accurate forces

IBRION = -1           # NO ionic relaxation
NSW    = 0

ISMEAR = 0
SIGMA  = 0.05
LREAL  = .FALSE.      # CRITICAL: must use reciprocal-space for phonon accuracy

LWAVE  = .FALSE.
LCHARG = .FALSE.

# Notes:
# 1. Pre-relax structure to EDIFFG=-0.001 before generating displacements
# 2. Use same ENCUT, KPOINTS, functional as pre-relaxation
# 3. Scale k-points inversely with supercell size
#    (e.g., 12x12x12 for unit cell -> 6x6x6 for 2x2x2 supercell)
